description: Dispatch of an unknown variant (§51.0.S.4). @gate.advance(.Bogus) names a literal bare-variant .Bogus that belongs to NEITHER the for= state enum (Gate) NOR the accepts= message enum (GateMsg). E-ENGINE-MSG-UNKNOWN fires (the §34 error partition).
rationale: §51.0.S.4 .advance(.X) where .X is a variant of neither the for= state enum nor the accepts= message enum fires E-ENGINE-MSG-UNKNOWN.
